name: ETALON GROUP GDR REGS 1
summary: Etalon Group PLC is a Russian residential development and construction company that focuses on developing and selling middle class residential real estate in Moscow, the Moscow region, and St. Petersburg. The company’s activities include pre-construction design, construction, and sales and marketing of apartments, townhouses, and cottages. Etalon Group is headquartered in St. Petersburg, Russia.
